程序包 com.bstek.ureport.expression.model

接口 Expression

所有超级接口:
Serializable
所有已知实现类:
BaseExpression, BooleanExpression, CellConditionExpression, CellCoordinateExpression, CellExpression, CellObjectExpression, CellPairExpression, CellPositionExpression, CellValueExpression, CurrentCellDataExpression, CurrentCellValueExpression, DatasetExpression, DatasetValue, ElseExpression, ElseIfExpression, ExpressionBlock, FromToExpression, FunctionExpression, IfExpression, IntegerExpression, JoinExpression, NullExpression, NumberExpression, ParenExpression, RelativeCellExpression, SimpleValueSetExpression, StringExpression, VariableAssignExpression, VariableExpression, WholeCellExpression
public interface Expression extends Serializable
